steps.title: Prepare the legs
steps.content: Fold the legs as indicated on the template

tip.text: Ensure folds are even and aligned to avoid distortion in the final shape.

steps.title: Prepare the legs
steps.content: Stitch around the legs with a 3mm seam allowance, leaving the tops open

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare the legs
steps.content: Turn the legs to the right side.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Prepare the legs
steps.content: Stuff each leg with toy filling

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare the legs
steps.content: Flatten the tops of the legs and center the seam

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare the legs
steps.content: Stitch across to seal.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare the arms
steps.content: Divide the arm pieces into two set

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare the arms
steps.content: Position the arms with right sides facing

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare the arms
steps.content: Stitch around the arms, leaving a small gap

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare the arms
steps.content: Turn the arms to the right side and tease out the seam edges

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Prepare the arms
steps.content: Stuff with filler and hand stitch the gaps closed.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare the ears
steps.content: Divide the ear pieces into two sets.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare the ears
steps.content: With right sides facing, stitch around the curved edges.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare the ears
steps.content: Turn the ears to the right side through the open edge.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Prepare the ears
steps.content: Tease out the seams and press flat.

tip.text: Press seams as you go to set stitches and improve overall garment quality.

steps.title: Prepare the ears
steps.content: Position the ears as indicated on the front head and body pieces and stitch in place

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Stitch the center front edges of the front head and body pieces together.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Position the back head and body pieces over the front with right sides facing

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Pin and stitch from the base of the body, up and around the head to the opposite body edge, leaving the base open.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Clip the seam allowance around the neck and shoulder areas

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Turn the body and head to the right side through the gap at the base

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Stuff and close the body
steps.content: Stuff the body and head firmly

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Stuff and close the body
steps.content: Hand or machine stitch the tops of the legs to the front open edge at the base of the body.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Stuff and close the body
steps.content: Hand slip-stitch the gap at the base closed, covering the seam allowances from the tops of the legs

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach the arms
steps.content: Attach the arms to the shoulders of the body as indicated on the template using a strong thread and needle

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach the arms
steps.content: Pass the needle through one arm and the body, then out the opposite side and attach the other arm.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach the arms
steps.content: Pull the thread tight and fasten off securely.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Add facial features
steps.content: Stitch the black beads to the positions marked on the template for eyes.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Add facial features
steps.content: Oversew a line with black thread to make the nose.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: Fold the hairband strip in half with right sides facing

tip.text: Ensure folds are even and aligned to avoid distortion in the final shape.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: Stitch the length of the strip with a 5mm seam allowance

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: Turn the tube to the right side and press flat.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: Cut a 23cm length of elastic and thread through the tube, securing both ends by stitching through all layers.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: Wrap the two ends of the band over each other to make a ring, then stitch across

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: To make the bow, fold the bow fabric piece in half and stitch the edges together, leaving a gap.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: Turn the bow to the right side, tease out the corners, and press flat.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: Tie the bow in a knot around the joined area of the band.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the hairband
steps.content: Place the band on the teddy's head in front of her ears.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the skirt
steps.content: Make two lines of gathering stitch along one of the long edges of the skirt strip.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the skirt
steps.content: Fold and press the waistband in half lengthways.

tip.text: Press seams as you go to set stitches and improve overall garment quality.

steps.title: Make the skirt
steps.content: Pull up the gathering stitches until the skirt piece is the same length as the waistband

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the skirt
steps.content: Pin the waistband to the gathered edge with all raw edges matching, and stitch across

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the skirt
steps.content: Turn and machine stitch a hem at the base of the skirt.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the skirt
steps.content: Position and stitch the ends together from the hem up through the waistband

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the skirt
steps.content: Turn the skirt to the right side and dress the doll, pulling the waistband up under her arms.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the cardigan
steps.content: Fold and stitch the sleeve parts of the cardigan together as indicated on the template.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the cardigan
steps.content: Turn the sleeves to the right side and pull the cardigan onto her arms.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Prepare the body
steps.content: Cut two bodies, four ears, and two hands from cream fabric, using a 6mm seam allowance.

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and mark accurately to ensure clean, precise cuts.

steps.title: Prepare the body
steps.content: Trim one hat from polka dot print and two feet from red print fabric.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare the body
steps.content: Transfer facial features to the right side of one body piece and ear positions to the wrong side.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Assemble the ears and body
steps.content: Pin the ears together in pairs and stitch, leaving the short side edges open.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble the ears and body
steps.content: Tack the ears to one body piece, matching raw edges to guide marks

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Assemble the ears and body
steps.content: Pin the other body piece on top, right sides facing, and machine stitch around the top edges, leaving the bottom open

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Finish and stuff the body
steps.content: Trim the seam allowance to 3mm and press back a 1cm seam allowance along the bottom edge.

tip.text: Press seams as you go to set stitches and improve overall garment quality.

steps.title: Finish and stuff the body
steps.content: Turn the body right side out and stuff

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Create the legs
steps.content: Cut two 6cm x 20cm rectangles from polka dot fabric for the legs

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and mark accurately to ensure clean, precise cuts.

steps.title: Create the legs
steps.content: Pin a foot to the bottom of each leg, right sides facing, sew together, and topstitch the seam.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create the legs
steps.content: Fold in half lengthways, pin, and stitch the foot and leg seams, leaving the top open

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create the legs
steps.content: Trim the seam allowance to 3mm, turn out, and stuff, leaving the top 2cm unfilled.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Attach legs to the body
steps.content: Pin the raw edges of the legs inside the body opening so the feet point forwards.

tip.text: Always pin at key points to prevent fabric shifting during stitching.

steps.title: Attach legs to the body
steps.content: Tack the front and back body pieces together, enclosing the legs, then machine stitch through all layers.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the pants
steps.content: Cut 8.5cm x 20cm from red print fabric for the pants.

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and mark accurately to ensure clean, precise cuts.

steps.title: Make the pants
steps.content: Fold in half widthways, wrong sides facing, and stitch across the long side to make a tube.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the pants
steps.content: Create a narrow double hem along the top and bottom edges.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the pants
steps.content: Work a few stitches in the middle of the bottom edge to create two legs

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the pants
steps.content: Turn out and slip over the body

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Create the tunic
steps.content: Trim 3cm x 25cm from polka dot print for binding and 25cm x 30cm from red print fabric for the tunic.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create the tunic
steps.content: Fold back and press 6mm along one long edge of the binding material.

tip.text: Press seams as you go to set stitches and improve overall garment quality.

steps.title: Create the tunic
steps.content: Pin the raw edge of the binding, right sides facing, to the bottom edge of the tunic.

tip.text: Always pin at key points to prevent fabric shifting during stitching.

steps.title: Create the tunic
steps.content: Machine stitch 1cm from the edge, then fold the neatened edge of the binding to the back. Slip-stitch in place and sew down.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble and attach the tunic
steps.content: Fold the tunic in half lengthways, right sides together, and join the long edges to make a tube.

tip.text: Ensure folds are even and aligned to avoid distortion in the final shape.

steps.title: Assemble and attach the tunic
steps.content: Press back a 5cm turning along the top edge and stitch

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Assemble and attach the tunic
steps.content: Turn right side out and press back a 4cm turning around the neck to make a frilled collar

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Assemble and attach the tunic
steps.content: Sew gathering stitches along the crease line, then slip the dress over the pixie.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble and attach the tunic
steps.content: Pull up the thread around the neck, adjust the gathers evenly, and fasten off securely.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create and attach the arms
steps.content: Trim two 6cm x 10cm pieces from red print for arms.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create and attach the arms
steps.content: Sew the hands to the arms and make up in the same way as the legs. Gather up the top edges, push in the seam allowance and fasten securely.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create and attach the arms
steps.content: Cut two 6cm x 12cm rectangles from polka dot fabric for the sleeves. Fold in half widthways, right sides facing, and join the short edges.

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and mark accurately to ensure clean, precise cuts.

steps.title: Create and attach the arms
steps.content: Hem the bottom edges, then gather the top edge and push the seam allowance inwards to make a bell shape.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create and attach the arms
steps.content: Securely stitch to the top of the arms, then sew the arms firmly through the tunic and to the body, under the frilled collar.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the hat and scarf
steps.content: Sew the side edges of the hat together, right sides facing, and press back a 1cm turning along the bottom edge.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the hat and scarf
steps.content: Turn out and stuff lightly. Sew in place on top of the head

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the hat and scarf
steps.content: Embroider the facial features using single strands of black and red thread

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the hat and scarf
steps.content: Trim 5cm x 29cm from polka dot print for the scarf. Fold in half lengthways and stitch the long edges.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the hat and scarf
steps.content: Turn out and press, then knot and trim the ends. Tie in place around the neck.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Prepare the legs
steps.content: Stitch two pairs of legs together with right sides together, using a 3mm seam allowance, starting from the base of the foot, all the way around the outer edges of the legs to the opposite edge of the foot

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare the legs
steps.content: Match the notch at the back of the felt sole to the back seam of the leg and the front to the front seam of the leg, then stitch the sole to the foot

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Turn and stuff legs
steps.content: Make a small cut on the top of the leg as marked on the template.

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and mark accurately to ensure clean, precise cuts.

steps.title: Turn and stuff legs
steps.content: Clip the concave curves of the seam allowance and turn the legs right side out through the small cuts.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Turn and stuff legs
steps.content: Tease out the edges, then stuff the legs firmly

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.
Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare the arms
steps.content: Stitch the felt hands to the straight edges of the underarm pieces

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare the arms
steps.content: Sew the top arms to the underarms all the way around

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare the arms
steps.content: Make the small slits in the top of the underarms, turn right side out, stuff firmly and enclose a joint in each arm in the same way as the legs

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Assemble the body
steps.content: Stitch the darts into the top and base of the body pieces, match the two together, then stitch from the notch in the back seam up and over the neck, down around the base, and back up to the lower notch in the back seam

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble the body
steps.content: Make tiny holes in the joint positions marked on the body template.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Assemble the body
steps.content: Turn the body right side out through the gap in the back seam

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Attach limbs to body
steps.content: Place a washer onto the shank of the joint, pass the shank through the corresponding hole, then push the backs of the joints on firmly. Repeat the process attaching the arms and legs.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach limbs to body
steps.content: Fill the body tightly with stuffing

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach limbs to body
steps.content: Over sew the gap closed

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the ears
steps.content: Turn up 3mm at the base of each ear piece.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the ears
steps.content: Divide the ear pieces into pairs, pin and stitch around the edges, then turn right side out.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Assemble the head
steps.content: Match the chin seam of the side head pieces together and stitch.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble the head
steps.content: Position the top head to the side heads by matching the nose on each piece together and then the side edges of the top head to the top edge of the side head pieces; stitch in place from the nose to the back neck on both sides.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Finishing the head
steps.content: Attach the nose by passing the shank through the chin seam close to the tip of the nose position on the head.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Finishing the head
steps.content: Push the eyes through the side head seams and attach in the positions marked on the template.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Finishing the head
steps.content: Fill the head tightly with stuffing

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Finishing the head
steps.content: Position the ears as indicated on the side and top head template and hand slip-stitch in place, making a small pleat in the centre

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach head to body
steps.content: Make a running stitch all the way around the base open edge of the head and pull up firmly.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach head to body
steps.content: Match the chin seam to the centre front body seam and over sew the head in position

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach head to body
steps.content: Match the chin seam to the centre front body seam and over sew the head in position.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare Arms and Hands
steps.content: Divide the red arms and cream hands into two sets.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Project Detail – Prepare Arms and Hands
steps.content: Stitch the hands to the ends of the arms with a 3mm seam allowance.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Project Detail – Prepare Arms and Hands
steps.content: With right sides together, sew around the arms and hands, leaving a gap on a straight part of the seams.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Prepare Arms and Hands
steps.content: Clip the curves and between the thumb.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare Arms and Hands
steps.content: Turn the arms to the right side

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Prepare Arms and Hands
steps.content: Stuff each arm and close the gap.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare Arms and Hands
steps.content: Repeat for the second arm set.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare Legs
steps.content: Repeat the arm construction process for the two pairs of cream legs, leaving a gap for stuffing.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare Legs
steps.content: Turn to the right side, stuff, and close the gap

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Assemble Head and Body
steps.content: Stitch the red body pieces to the cream head pieces at the neck edges.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble Head and Body
steps.content: With right sides facing, stitch the head and body pieces together, leaving the straight edge at the top of the head open

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble Head and Body
steps.content: Clip into the neck corners and turn the head and body to the right side

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Assemble Head and Body
steps.content: Stuff firmly.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Assemble Head and Body
steps.content: Make a running stitch around the top opening of the head, pull up the thread tightly around the stuffing, and stitch the two edges together.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach Limbs
steps.content: With cream thread, attach the legs to the base of the body, passing the needle through the body to the opposite side

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach Limbs
steps.content: Attach the other leg, stitch backwards and forwards a few times, pull the thread tight, and fasten off securely

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach Limbs
steps.content: Repeat the same process to attach the arms, using red thread.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create Hair
steps.content: Wind beige yarn around a 28cm wide piece of card until the strands hang 14cm wide.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create Hair
steps.content: Stick masking tape along the strands to hold them together.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create Hair
steps.content: Remove the yarn hank from the card and stitch through the center of the tape to create the parting.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create Hair
steps.content: Cut through the strands at the opposite side to the stitching line and remove the tape

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create Hair
steps.content: Position the hair on the center of the doll's head and hand stitch from the forehead to the base of the neck

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create Hair
steps.content: Make two plaits in the front of the hair, then wind each plait into a bun and secure to the head.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Add Facial Features
steps.content: Mark the eye and mouth positions on the head.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Add Facial Features
steps.content: Stitch two oval beads in the eye positions.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Add Facial Features
steps.content: In pink thread, embroider a V shape to form the mouth, and two tiny stitches above for the nose.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Add Facial Features
steps.content: Brush a little blusher onto the cheeks.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the Shoes
steps.content: Fold each beige felt boot in half, matching the toe curved edges together, and stitch from the base to the top.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the Shoes
steps.content: Stitch the soles to the boots, matching the back and front notches together, then turn to the right side.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Decorate Skirt and Sleeves
steps.content: Cut a strip of wadding to 2cm wide and the circumference of the skirt, then edgestitch the strip to the hem of the 20cm red jersey circle (with a 3cm diameter circle cut from the center).

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Decorate Skirt and Sleeves
steps.content: Trim the red edges at the base of the arms with wadding in the same way, and hand stitch in place, along with a strip around her neck.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create and Attach Apron
steps.content: For the apron, fold and edgestitch a hem around three edges of the 7cm x 13cm white fabric rectangle.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create and Attach Apron
steps.content: To the remaining long edge, make a row of gathering stitches

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create and Attach Apron
steps.content: Pull up the stitches and secure by placing the white ribbon over the gathers and stitching, securing the ribbon.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Create and Attach Apron
steps.content: Edgestitch a length of lace to the hem of the apron.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Cut - pattern cut
steps.content:
Seam allowance of 1.5 cm is included. Apply fusible interfacing for better structure
Cut 2 pieces for the hat crown using pattern piece 1. These piece form the top section of the hat

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and cut in smooth, continuous strokes for clean and accurate edges.

steps.title: Cut - pattern cut
steps.content:
Seam allowance of 1.5 cm is included. Apply fusible interfacing for better structure
Cut 4 pieces for the hat crown using pattern piece 2. These piece build the side shape of the hat

steps.title: Cut - pattern cut
steps.content:
Seam allowance of 1.5 cm is included. Apply fusible interfacing for better structure

steps.title: Seam sew
steps.content:
Pin seams before sewing
Match edges carefully to keep the shape even
Align the hat side pieces right sides facing and sew the side seams to form a ring

tip.text: Misalignment is common—pin key points and edges first to prevent shifting while sewing.

steps.title: Join sew
steps.content:
Clip curves if needed.
Distribute fabric evenly when sewing curves
Sew the hat crown to the side ring, aligning edges to form the top structure

tip.text: Sew slowly along curves and reduce stitch length slightly to prevent puckering and maintain a smooth seam.

steps.title: Seam sew
steps.content:
Check seam alignment before stitching
Keep seams alignment for a smooth brim shape
Align the brim piếc right sides facing and sew the side seams to form a ring

tip.text: Misalignment is common—pin key points and edges first to prevent shifting while sewing.

steps.title: Join sew
steps.content:
Pin evenly around the circle
Ensure the brim is evenly attached around 
Sew the brim to the hat side , aligning edges carefully

tip.text: Misalignment is common—pin key points and edges first to prevent shifting while sewing.

steps.title: Repeat sew
steps.content:
Compare layers before continuing.
Keep inner and outer layers consistent in shape
Repeat the same sewing steps to assemble the inner layer of the hat

tip.text: Control fabric movement carefully and sew steadily to maintain accuracy and a professional finish.

steps.title: Turn press
steps.content:
Use steam for best result.
Smooth seams before pressing
Turn the inner layer right side out and press to shape

tip.text: Turn the piece gently using a blunt tool to avoid putting stress on the seams.

steps.title: Edge sew
steps.content:
Mark opening clearly before sewing.
Do not sew the 6 cm opening for turning
Place inner layer inside outer layer and sew around the brim edge, levaing a 6 cm turning opening

tip.text: Turn the piece gently using a blunt tool to avoid putting stress on the seams.

steps.title: Turn press
steps.content:
Use a blunt tool for edges.
Shape the brim evenly after turning
Turn the hat right side outr through the opening and press neatly

tip.text: Turn the piece gently using a blunt tool to avoid putting stress on the seams.

steps.title: Close sew
steps.content:
Use small stitches for clean finish.
Align edges before stitching.
Sew the turning opening closed neatly

tip.text: Turn the piece gently using a blunt tool to avoid putting stress on the seams.

steps.title: Edge stitch
steps.content:
Use guide lines for accuracy
Keep stitchung lines smooth and even
Topstitching along the brim following the pattern lines to secure layers

tip.text: Use a longer stitch length and guide the edge carefully to achieve straight, professional topstitching.

steps.title: Edge stitch
steps.content:
Use presser foot edge as guide.
Maintain even spacing for s professional look
Topstitch around the top and bottom edges of the hat side, 0.5 cm from the edge

tip.text: Press seams as you go using appropriate heat to set stitches and improve final garment structure.

steps.title: Final press
steps.content:
Use correct heat for fabric.
Check all seam before final pressing
Press the entire hat to finish and smooth all seams

tip.text: Press seams as you go using appropriate heat to set stitches and improve final garment structure.

steps.title: Make the cape
steps.content: Turn to the right side, press and whipstitch the gap closed

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the cape
steps.content: Make knots, then fray out the raw ends of the ribbons

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the cape
steps.content: Tie the cape around the doll’s shoulders

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the shorts
steps.content: Cut two shorts from printed cotton and pin, right sides together

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and mark accurately to ensure clean, precise cuts.

steps.title: Make the shorts
steps.content: Sew the two outer sides together and the two inside legs.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the shorts
steps.content: Sew a 1.5cm hem along the top, leaving a 2cm gap

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the shorts
steps.content: Sew 1cm hems along both the leg holes

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the shorts
steps.content: Use a safety pin to guide elastic all the way through the waistband, then pull the ends to gather the waistband

tip.text: Always pin at key points to prevent fabric shifting during stitching.

steps.title: Make the shorts
steps.content: Secure with a knot and stitch the opening closed.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the belt
steps.content: Snip a belt, 7cm x 34cm, from printed cotton

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the belt
steps.content: Fold in half lengthways and sew down the longest edge, leaving a 7cm turning gap in the centre.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Prepare the doll pieces
steps.content: Download and print the templates.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Prepare the doll pieces
steps.content: Cut two pairs of arms, two pairs of legs, and one pair of head and body pieces from flesh colored jersey.

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and mark accurately to ensure clean, precise cuts.

steps.title: Prepare the doll pieces
steps.content: Cut one pair of top shoes and one pair of soles in ivory felt.

tip.text: Use sharp fabric scissors and mark accurately to ensure clean, precise cuts.

steps.title: Sew and stuff the limbs
steps.content: Divide the arms and legs into two sets.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Sew and stuff the limbs
steps.content: Stitch around the arms and legs with a 3mm seam allowance, leaving a small gap on a straight part of the seams.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Sew and stuff the limbs
steps.content: Clip the curved parts of the seam, then turn the arms and legs right side out.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Sew and stuff the limbs
steps.content: Stuff each limb, then slip stitch the gap closed by hand

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Sew the pair of head and body pieces together, leaving the straight edge at the top of the head open

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Turn right side out and stuff the body and the neck.

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Wrap the polystyrene ball in wadding and push into the head part of the doll.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Stuff either side of the ball to achieve a smooth even shape.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Assemble the head and body
steps.content: Make a running stitch around the top opening of the head, pull the thread tightly around the stuffing, then stitch the edges together.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach arms and legs
steps.content: Using strong thread and a long needle, attach the legs to the base of the body as indicated on the template.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach arms and legs
steps.content: Pass the needle through the body and out on the opposite side, then attach the other leg.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach arms and legs
steps.content: Pull the thread tight and fasten off securely

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach arms and legs
steps.content: Repeat the same process to attach the arms

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create the hair
steps.content: Wind the ivory and beige yarn together around a piece of card, 24cm wide, so that the strands lay next to each other until the hank measures 14cm wide.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Create the hair
steps.content: Cut through the yarns at both sides, then carefully machine stitch through the middle across the hank, attaching all the strands together; this becomes the centre parting

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach and style hair
steps.content: Position the hair in the centre of the head and hand stitch from the forehead to the base of the neck

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Attach and style hair
steps.content: Make two plaits in the front of the doll’s hair and tie a ribbon bow to the end of each

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach and style hair
steps.content: Carefully stick the remainder of the hair to the head in sections, using a hot glue gun.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Attach and style hair
steps.content: Trim the hair into a nice short bob and stitch the plaits to each side of the head.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Add facial features
steps.content: Mark the eyes and mouth position onto the face, then stick two small discs of black felt in the eye positions.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Add facial features
steps.content: Using pink thread, embroider a ‘V’ shape to form the mouth and two tiny stitches above for the nose

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Add facial features
steps.content: Brush a little blusher onto the cheeks.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.

steps.title: Make the shoes
steps.content: Punch holes as indicated on the template, then fold the top shoe in half matching the toe’s curved edges together

tip.text: Ensure folds are even and aligned to avoid distortion in the final shape.

steps.title: Make the shoes
steps.content: Stitch from the base to the notch

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the shoes
steps.content: Sew the soles to the shoes, matching the back notches together and turn right side out

tip.text: Turn gently and support seams to prevent stress or tearing, especially around corners.

steps.title: Make the shoes
steps.content: Tease out the seams, then edge stitch around the sole to form a narrow ridge.

tip.text: Maintain a consistent seam allowance and guide fabric evenly for a clean, professional finish.

steps.title: Make the shoes
steps.content: Thread two lengths of ribbon through the holes and tie the ends in bows.

tip.text: Work carefully and check alignment to achieve a clean and accurate result.
